summary: Iteration 27: ALL 12 FEATURE REFINEMENTS VERIFIED - Table/Tap/KDS/Manager/Owner modules. Backend API tests 15/15 passed. Frontend UI tests all passed via Playwright.

feature_1_table_open_form.description: Open table form requires BOTH Server AND Seats fields. Red border validation, validation messages ('Server must be selected before opening table', 'Number of seats must be selected'), Submit button disabled until both selected.

feature_2_barman_persistence.description: Bartender persists across category changes. Selected 'Ana Perez', switched to Cocktails and Spirits tabs - barman selector still shows 'Ana Perez'.

feature_3_cancel_confirm_buttons.description: Cancel Order (red/destructive) and Confirm Order (green) buttons visible in right panel when tab selected. data-testid='cancel-order-btn' and 'confirm-order-btn' present.

feature_4_clean_slate.description: After Confirm Order: barman selector resets to 'Select barman', panel shows 'Select a tab', toast confirms 'Order confirmed — ready for next customer'.

feature_5_kds_delayed.description: KDS page shows Delayed column with red-highlighted tickets (T2 John Smith, T3 Alex Turner). Delayed popup appears with 'ORDER DELAYED' message and Dismiss button.

feature_6_manager_tables_by_server.description: Manager Dashboard 'Tables by Server' tab shows tables grouped by server (Carlos Silva, Ana Perez). Tables clickable - drill-down panel shows table info, order items, and void/trash icons for each item.

feature_7_menu_sorting.description: Beers category items sorted alphabetically: IPA Draft → Lager → Pilsner → Stout. Backend API also confirms sorting.

feature_8_venue_selector.description: Owner Dashboard has 'All Venues' selector button in header. Dropdown shows 'All Venues' and 'Demo Club Updated' options.

feature_9_events_view.description: By Event view shows BOTH active (green badge) AND ended (gray badge) events. Active: TEST_Event_1772171324.699667, Test Friday Night. Ended: TEST_Event_1772171295.463399, Test Event, TEST_End_Event.

feature_10_performance_order.description: Performance tab: 'Performance by Venue' table appears ABOVE 'Performance by Event' section. Verified via UI and page content position.

feature_11_growth_loyalty.description: Growth & Loyalty tab shows: New vs Recurring Guests section (data-testid='new-vs-recurring') with circular indicators (3 New, 0 Recurring) and progress bar. Total Sign-ups KPI (data-testid='total-signups') shows 3.

feature_12_system_modules.description: System tab shows 'LICENSED MODULES' section (data-testid='modules-display') for Demo Club Updated. Module cards: Pulse (Entrance) ON, Tap (Bar) ON, Restaurant (Table) ON, KDS (Kitchen Display) ON, Loyalty & Rewards ON.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 27: All 12 feature refinements PASSED. TABLE: mandatory Server+Seats fields with validation. TAP: barman persistence, Cancel/Confirm buttons, clean slate. KDS: delayed column with red tickets. MANAGER: Tables by Server drill-down with void buttons. OWNER: venue selector, events view (active+ended), Performance order, Growth & Loyalty (New vs Recurring, Total Sign-ups), System (Licensed Modules with ON/OFF status). All data-testid attributes working correctly.
